Meaning.En: The tube in the neck through which food and air pass, or the front part of the neck, especially when considered as a site of swallowing, breathing, or vocalization.
Meaning.Example: She cleared her throat before speaking.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả vị trí đau hoặc khó chịu ở vùng cổ trước.
Situation.En: Describing pain or discomfort in the front of the neck.

Situation.Vi: Hành động khạc, ho hoặc nói chuyện qua cổ họng.
Situation.En: Actions such as clearing the throat, coughing, or vocalizing.

Meaning.Vi: Khàn giọng; nói khàn; nuốt vướng
Meaning.En: To speak in a hoarse or strained voice; to clear one’s throat audibly.
Meaning.Example: He throat-clearing loudly before delivering his speech.

Situation.Vi: Người nói cố làm rõ giọng trước khi phát biểu.
Situation.En: A speaker clears their throat to prepare for speaking.
